description: A procurement manager needs to add a new potential supplier to the system for a specific commodity.

nodes.task_description: Collect required documentation from the potential supplier (e.g., quality certifications, financial statements).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent receives and logs the necessary documents.

nodes.task_description: Enter the new supplier's details into the supplier relationship management (SRM) system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a new supplier profile with all contact and business information.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the supplier qualification workflow for internal review and approval.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent submits the new supplier profile for approval by the quality and finance teams.
